name: Obscurath
description: Entité abyssale venue des profondeurs du noyau terrestre, si ancienne qu'elle précède la vie elle-même. Sa seule présence altère la réalité géologique environnante.
prompt: Dark sci-fi fantasy, cosmic horror scale. An incomprehensibly vast entity partially emerging from a planet-wide fissure, its form barely visible through layers of rock, magma, and reality distortion. A mass of pupilless eyes of impossible sizes glow through cracks in the earth. The ground warps and reshapes around it — stone becomes liquid, gravity shifts. Ancient beyond measure, alien geometry in its geological body. Terrifying, cosmic, hyper-detailed, painterly epic art.
